# Factors {.unnumbered}

::: callout
## Learning Objectives
+ Reorder and relabel factor variables in data cleaning steps and data 
visualizations using `forcats` 
:::

<!-- https://r4ds.hadley.nz/factors.html 
https://r4ds.hadley.nz/workflow-style.html
https://r4ds.hadley.nz/communication.html  -->
